top_signals.title: Oil Sinks as US-Iran Deal Boosts Outlook for Reopening of Hormuz
top_signals.summary: Oil sank after the US and Iran agreed to an interim deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, though shipowners were still hunting for more details before committing to resuming transits.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Investors ‘reluctant’ to splash cash on UK banks amid crisis in Number 10
top_signals.summary: UK banks’ stock prices are being slapped with a political risk premium, City analysts have warned, as turmoil in Downing Street threatens to rock the sector. The FTSE 350 bank index has had a choppy start to the year with financial stocks facing a hammering from the Iran war as investors trimmed their equities exposure.  [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Christine Lagarde, Boris Vujčić: Monetary policy statement (with Q&A)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: EE.UU. e Irán acuerdan detener guerra y reanudar envíos de petróleo en Medio Oriente
top_signals.summary: E.UU. e Irán sellan un acuerdo provisional para reabrir el estrecho de Ormuz, poniendo fin a una guerra que dejó miles de muertos y abriendo 60 días de negociaciones nucleares.  (Source: Bloomberg)

top_signals.title: Activist Investor Ananym Urges Bio-Techne to Consider Selling
top_signals.summary: Activist investor Ananym Capital Management has built a stake in Bio-Techne Corp. and is pushing the board to conduct a strategic review that would include a potential sale.
